chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-459 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 2120/2025 3. For hearing of main case. 16.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Mahar, Advocate for the petitioner No.1. Mr. Nisar Ahmed Abro, Deputy Attorney General Pakistan along with Muhammad Saleem, Accounts Officer on behalf of respondent No.4..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Deputy Attorney General files statement on behalf of respondent No.4, which is taken on record. Copies thereof supplied to counsel for the petitioner. The Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
